name: 20"x32" Grid Weave Bath Rug Cream/Gray - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Woven Cotton, Machine Washable
description:
Elevate your bathroom decor with this Grid Weave Bath Rug from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This rectangular bath rug features a black and gray grid pattern on a cream backdrop for a chic look. Made from woven-textured material, this handmade rug feels soft and comfortable underfoot. Plus, this lightweight bath rug is easily machine washable. Place it in front of your bathtub, shower or sink for functional style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
